warningExpired: License expired — payments may be blocked. Please contact support.
renewPrimaryHintBrowser: Open admin license page in browser
renewOpenFailedMailBody: Could not open the email app.
loadFailedHint: Status unavailable. Check network and try again later.
transferSectionTitle: Transfer license to a new server
transferSectionIntro: Check whether your REGK key is eligible for a server move. Support needs this device's fingerprint to issue the binding for the new host.
transferMachineEmpty: Not loaded yet — wait for license status or refresh.
transferNextSteps: Contact support with your REGK key, this fingerprint, and a short note that you are moving servers. Only support completes the transfer.
transferErrorNotFound: No issued license matched that key.
transferErrorGeneric: Request failed. Check network or API.
activationKeyHint: Format: REGK, five characters, hyphen, five characters, hyphen, five characters (no spaces).
activationFailed: Activation failed. Check the key or contact support.
activationNetwork: Network error. Check the connection and try again.
activationFingerprintMismatch: Device fingerprint does not match this server. Contact support.
activationRevokedOrTransferred: This key was revoked or transferred. Use the replacement key from support.
activationRemoteRejected: The license server did not accept this key for this device.
activationDisabledExport: Activation is not available in this mode.
activationDbRecordFailed: License was saved but activation could not be recorded in the database. Check the server.
activationInternalError: Internal activation error. Please try again later.
activationOfflinePemMissing: Offline activation is not configured on the server. Contact support.
activationExtendBody: Write to {{email}} or use the button below. Include your REGK key and the device fingerprint from the license status.

criticalGuard.expiredBody: Your trial license has expired. Payments are blocked. Please contact your administrator.
criticalGuard.trialSoonBody: Your trial license ends in {{count}} day(s). Continue anyway?
criticalGuard.featureDeniedBody: This action is not included in your current license ({{featureId}}). Please contact your administrator.
